name: Avionics UART Peripheral Mapping
description: You are an Agricultural Technician integrating a custom crop-inspection and precision-spraying drone. Configure the flight controller's serial ports (UARTs) for SERIAL3, SERIAL4, SERIAL5, and SERIAL6 based on the integration schematic located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/wiring_diagram.txt. Update the protocol and baud rate parameters for each port to match the hardware-to-software mappings, protocols, and baud rates specified in the schematic.
